top_signals.title: LNG Tanker Heads Toward Hormuz as Deal Lifts Reopening Hopes
top_signals.summary: A liquefied natural gas tanker that has been trapped in the Persian Gulf for over three months appears to be heading toward the Strait of Hormuz, just as the US and Iran say they have reached a deal to reopen the waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump tells Putin he is ready to help end Ukraine conflict, Kremlin adviser says
top_signals.summary: The two leaders spoke for 55 ​minutes on Sunday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: IFM Investors Raises Price in Atlas Arteria Takeover Bid
top_signals.summary: IFM Investors has increased its bid and removed certain conditions in its best and final offer for Australian-listed toll road operator Atlas Arteria Ltd.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
